scripts.build: tsc --build && npm run generate:browser-tools-catalog && npm run --prefix platform/browser-extension build:bundle && npm run --prefix platform/browser-extension build:side-panel && tsx scripts/generate-icons.ts && tsx scripts/install-extension.ts && npm rebuild @opentabs-dev/cli @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools && chmod +x platform/cli/dist/cli.js platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js platform/create-plugin/dist/index.js
scripts.build:force: tsc --build --force && npm run generate:browser-tools-catalog && npm run --prefix platform/browser-extension build:bundle && npm run --prefix platform/browser-extension build:side-panel && tsx scripts/generate-icons.ts && tsx scripts/install-extension.ts && npm rebuild @opentabs-dev/cli @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools && chmod +x platform/cli/dist/cli.js platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js platform/create-plugin/dist/index.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run build:plugins && npm run storybook:build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run knip && npm run test
scripts.check:everything: npm run check && npm run test:e2e && npm run check:docs && npm run check:plugins
scripts.test:e2e: cd plugins/e2e-test && npm ci && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && OPENTABS_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/opentabs-e2e-prebuild npm run build && cd ../.. && npx playwright test
